author: customize
text:
balls: changelog: collapse duplicate 0.3.10 `### Changes` blocks

release-plz wrote a [0.3.10] section from commit subjects, but the repo had also been hand-curating [Unreleased] with multi-sentence bullets. Both landed in the released file under separate `### Changes` headings. Fold the three curated bullets (bl-2148, bl-2bf7, bl-2572) into the single release-plz block, replacing their auto-generated one-liners in place; drop the duplicate heading; leave [Unreleased] empty.

Doc-only. Subject starts with `balls:` so release-plz's commit_parsers skip it — no version bump in the next changelog cut.
